bottles.message: Everything is going to be okay
Just wanted to let you know that for a few weeks now I have been healing, and I sincerely hope you will get to heal too, or anything else that you may need. Life can be great too.
Hello villager- life is hard but you are brave! We’ll get through this together!
Can you find something to be grateful today? Whether it's upcoming or it already happened, anything nice no matter how small. This evening the spaghetti I made turned out really tasty!
even if all seems dark, dont give up! it does get easier with time

Just here to let you know that there's people out there that love and appreciate you and when you feel like that's not the case, they are yet to appear in your life - so stay strong! Also, go to the gym :P
To everyone who is sick right now, like me, wether it‘s physical or mental, stay strong!! I love you!! Enjoy your time and well deserved rest on your Island! Get better soon <333
Life's gonna keep throwing challenges at you. While it may be harsh, the world was not made for those like us and maybe that'sokay. Always keep fighting for whoyou want to be <3
Don't just sit there and waste your precious time. When you want to do something, do it right away. Do it when you can. It's the only way to live a life without regrets.
Whatever you are going to do:Don't be afraid! You got this!I believe in you! ♥️
I hope you have a nice day!
I am hungry.
Sometimes, I gaze upon the night sky, with you on my mind. I breath the breeze as clouds fly, and wish to leave it all behind. But where do I go if not to you... Do you often think of me too?
You're a treasure, it's true! Amidst the deep dark blue. You're a gem, one of its kind, a beautiful rare find. You are greatness born from pain, an oyster's sweet refrain! Life is your oyster!

Fireworks are one of my favorite things in life. We only see them here on New Year's and they never fail to amaze me. They remind me of being a child filled with wonder and my heart fills with happiness ♥
If you're depressed, having something to look forward to can help! It can be a meal you're going to make, having a get-together with friends, or even watching a movie with popcorn.
I like cheese. Cheese is nice. Mozzarella is good. Feta is good. Cheddar is the BEST. Kirkland cheddar? On TOP. 10/10 BEST cheddar. You should try it.
bottles.signature: Happy cheese tasting, from Your Friend

bottles.message: Hiiiiiiiiiii
You are loved.
Don't give up! :>
I wish you luck because life ain't easy and I absolutely wish you to be kind and have a good heart for that’s how true life is meant to be experienced.

Oh, so we all depressed, huh. What a crazy place to find ourselves.
I don't have any words of wisdom.
Just know we're all here together.
Remember to take life a step at a time and cherish the moments you get. And drink water!!
Life sucks and I doubt my personal decisions every day. But today is sunny and I had nice food and I ran into a friend. Let's hang in there a little longer!

Where ever you are in life, I wish you will succeed at all your endeavours and do know that things will get better.
You are not alone in this and you are loved and cared for.
bottles.signature: From the fairy trapped in the bottle

bottles.message: I wish it didn't have to end like that. A mockery of a memory, carved from stone and a scribbled down letter. Wherever you are, I hope you're in a better place now.
love yourself man. its never easy but it ends.
Hello! i hope you're having a good day. If you see this you have to get up and walk for a bit, and make a hot beverage of choice
Appreciate it while it lasts. ♡
Don’t forget to salt your soup after you taste it.
Be kind to yourself, especially when it feels hardest to. You deserve peace and happiness.
A message in a bottle! Lol
I know times may be tough, but you've survived tough times before. Just take it one moment at a time, and remember to breathe.

Seasons change,
And people too. May your dreams Soon come true!

Remember, in this world you either hydrate,
or diedrate.
Or was it mayor? When was the last time you checked in on your animal crossing town? Your villagers miss you!
I just got back into playing Animal Crossing after a year and a half of not playing due to isolation and mental health. It’s really helped - I hope you can find something healing as well <3
bottles.signature: From A Friend in the US

bottles.message:
Did you know you can write letters online just like in the games? At least it LOOKS like an authenticletter. It even gives you the limited textspace.
Wait, I am not done yet, wai

bottles.message:
You should really, really watch Meta Runner.
Trust me on this one.
Despite subject's unresponsiveness and continued state of suspended animation, brain activity was detected. Efforts to establish communication have proven fruitless thus far.
I'm sorry they did this to you. You never deserved any of it.
Have you remembered to drink water today? Remembered to eat? Stretch? Think about something positive? Taking care of your body and mind is important.
What a stroke of luck you are reading this, because I have a very important message for you: Keep being awesome, you got this 💜
Please don't ignore your health, you don't wanna end up like an unfixable doll from the 1900s.
bottles.signature: From a being that can't do the same

bottles.message:
I hope you're having a great summer !!
I wish you all the best in life, even if it's not easy.Remember that you are loved.Have a nice day
We've been trying to reach you concerning your vehicle's extended warranty. You should've received a notice in the mail about your car's extended warranty eligibility.
Cheese, gromit
Sometimes, it really does get better. Keep holding on. I love you. I'm glad I exist.
There is still time.

You can't control what other people do. You can only control how you react to situations. Life is a lot easier when you understand this.

In the deep darkness of night, everything feels heavier. Allow yourself some sleep — the morning will lift some of that weight. Every day is a fresh start! Every day is a chance to make things better.
Future is now. Act swiftly. Leave no stone unturned.
Congratulations on your big move! We hope you enjoy your new island life. Always keep your turtles in a row.
May this be a beautiful day
You're doing better than you think, aim for the stars!
Some days are harder than others. But life is always moving between highs and lows. Hang in there!
I believe in you. Stay frosty.
Hello! My name is Joe!

You are filled with a sense of pride, determination. What steps you take next are the biggest steps you've taken, headed for an amazing destination.

I know you need a support. Human beings evolved like this, we need a community but not much big, family and little ones to satisfy our parenting needs. Just accept what you want and you will be happier.

eat some more grapes. it will help.

Greetings from Helsinki, friend.  The weather changes day by day, but we're always alive to see it.
I really think your butt is fantastic!
We thought it was over, but we just need to wait a little more. Like a moth to the flame, my hopes are dashed.

bottles.message:
Hope you're enjoying your day! I know mine's much better having discovered this site.
And remember, always do the thing you've been waiting to do!!
Sometimes life takes you to the highest point only to drop you down. It's okay. Every fall teaches you and makes you stronger to soar higher. Be strong.
Every single day doesn't have to be perfect. Sometimes it's extremely hard to do even 1% of what you intended. Just remember that what matters is that you did that 1%.
I want to share with you that we have successfully completed 25 years today.
Greetings from New York City! I hope this letter reaches you far away. Be sure to do something nice for yourself today, even if it's something small -- those little moments add up!
I want to tell you that you are awesome and unique, no matter who you are, where you are or what you are doing and how much you are trying. Keep your head up and try to enjoy every moment you have

Hello! I hope you are doing well, that your days have been fun with life and your heart has been warm with kindness. I think a lot of us need a little more kindness these days, so I wanted to help spread that. I hope you don't mind! Please know you are important, you are loved and you are worth it 💕
